程序包 com.ifels.controlflex.api

接口 IControllerCapabilities

public interface IControllerCapabilities
Read-only view of controller hardware capabilities. Bridge mods can use this to adapt UI and behavior based on which features the connected controller supports.

Obtain via IInputProvider.getCapabilities().

从以下版本开始:
1.0.0

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    ControllerType
    getControllerType()
    Controller type classification.
    int
    getPaddleCount()
    Number of rear paddles (0 if none).
    boolean
    hasAnalogTriggers()
    Whether the controller has analog triggers (vs. digital).
    boolean
    hasGyro()
    Whether the controller supports gyroscope (motion sensors).
    boolean
    hasPaddles()
    Whether the controller has rear paddles.
    boolean
    hasRumble()
    Whether the controller supports haptic feedback (rumble).
    boolean
    hasTouchpad()
    Whether the controller has a clickable touchpad.
    boolean
    isNintendoLayout()
    Whether the controller uses Nintendo-style face button layout (A/B swapped vs Xbox).

      ControllerType getControllerType()
      Controller type classification.

    • hasPaddles

      boolean hasPaddles()
      Whether the controller has rear paddles.

      Number of rear paddles (0 if none).

    • hasTouchpad

      boolean hasTouchpad()
      Whether the controller has a clickable touchpad.

      Whether the controller supports gyroscope (motion sensors).

      Whether the controller supports haptic feedback (rumble).

      boolean hasAnalogTriggers()
      Whether the controller has analog triggers (vs. digital).

    • isNintendoLayout

      boolean isNintendoLayout()
      Whether the controller uses Nintendo-style face button layout (A/B swapped vs Xbox).
